_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Urethroplasty- Follow up: Is very important because most Urethral strictures recure with in first year or two after surgery.
Within 3 months of initial surgery, patients have their urinary flow checked and under a cystoscopy to check the re-scarring.
At this stage patients usually advised to come for a follow up after 12 months.

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission (not required)
Discharge Summary of last Urethroplasty performed

claim.label: Detailed clinical notes of the current visit
Detailed procedure / operative notes detailing size of dilators used (not required)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, planned line of treatment, indication for procedure submitted?
Did the Anterograde urethrography/ Retrograde urethrography (RGU) / Micturating cystourethrography (MCU) Investigation reports submitted?
Was Discharge Summary of last Urethroplasty performed submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details available?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes submitted?
Are the detailed procedure / operative notes detailing size of dilators used?
Are the detailed clinical notes of the current visit submitted?
Post procedure USG/ Uroflowmetry report submitted?

common_queries: Discharge Summary of last Urethroplasty not submitted at pre-authorization for follow-up
Detailed clinical notes of the current visit not submitted at claim stage
Post procedure USG/ Uroflowmetry report not submitted at claim stage
Anterograde urethrography/Retrograde urethrography (RGU)/Micturating cystourethrography (MCU) reports submitted at pre-authorization (when not required)
Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) submitted at claim stage (when not required)

clinical_key_pointers: Urethroplasty- Follow up: Is very important because most Urethral strictures recure with in first year or two after surgery.

Within 3 months of initial surgery, patients have their urinary flow checked and under a cystoscopy to check the re-scarring. At this stage patients usually advised to come for a follow up after 12 months. Uroflowmetry play a key role in the follow-up of these patients.
additional_information.post_op_care: Follow up: Some non-invasive testing includes: Uroflowmetry (provides quantitative data such as maximum and average flow rates in mL/second, voiding curves, and voided volume in mL). Ultrasound post-void residual (PVR) (provides objective data regarding bladder emptying, an elevated PVR correlates with obstructive voiding).
